labels.label: aligned
labels.description: BBE and commercial source periods describe the same or directly matched read.

labels.label: directionally comparable
labels.description: Sources are close enough to inform the read directionally, but should not be treated as a strict causal proof.

labels.label: lagged
labels.description: One source appears to lag the other and should be interpreted as context, not a synchronized read.

labels.label: not comparable
labels.description: Sources do not share a compatible lens or period.

labels.label: insufficient
labels.description: The active packet does not contain enough source-period evidence to connect BBE and GN.
